instructions: keep the same safe_evidence_ref on every group and item
replace summary_hint and material_ref_hint with redacted material metadata before intake
do not paste local paths, serial devices, DB URLs, OSS keys, passwords, tokens, or success/control claims
rerun real_material_evidence_intake after the field owner fills the manifest

vendor_source_boundary.hardware_conclusion: template cites local vendor boundaries only; it does not prove WAVE ROVER UART, HIL, real sensor procurement, phone acceptance, route/elevator completion, or cloud readiness
